rows.description: Computus Dni Rectoris a 2do Die Novm 1814
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visually, this is the first distinct line of the page title. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined it with the second title line.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually, this is the second distinct line of the page title. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined it with the first title line.
Selected gpt-5-mini's description as more accurate for 'Arrearagia'. Removed the trailing dash, which is not present in the image. gemini-flash had a typo 'Arreagia'.
Combined best parts: gpt-5-mini's 'Rents' is correct (gemini-flash had 'Repts'). Visually, the line ends with a period, so removed trailing dash from gpt-5-mini and added period from gemini-flash.

Selected gemini-flash description as more accurate. Visually confirmed '135' pounds. Dashes in shillings/pence columns indicate 0, so used 0 for amounts (gpt-5-mini's convention) rather than empty strings (gemini-flash).

Selected gemini-flash description as more accurate. Visually confirmed '136' pounds. Dashes in shillings/pence columns indicate 0, so used 0 for amounts (gpt-5-mini's convention) rather than empty strings (gemini-flash).
Selected gemini-flash description as accurate. Visually confirmed '10' shillings. Dashes in pounds/pence columns indicate 0, so used 0 for amounts (gpt-5-mini's convention).
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed 'Banwell' with no associated monetary amount. gpt-5-mini missed this row.
Consensus reached between both extractors. Visually confirmed as a header with no amounts.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed 'Kidlington Rectory' has no amount on its line. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned an amount to this row that belongs to a later row. gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified that no amount was visible on this line.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed 'Do 2 Yrs' as a distinct entry line with no associated monetary amount. gpt-5-mini missed this row.

Used gpt-5-mini's amounts and reasoning, which correctly identified 4.19.0 and its alignment. Corrected description from 'Vicarage' to 'Vicassage' based on visual inspection of the script. gemini-flash incorrectly stated no amounts visible for this row.
Consensus reached between both extractors. Visually confirmed as a header with no amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'St. Newington P. I. D'. Amount is clearly '17.11.0'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '171' for pounds.
Selected gemini-flash description, which is visually more accurate. Consensus reached on the amounts (42.9.4½) and fraction interpretation by both extractors.
Selected gemini-flash description, which is visually more accurate. Consensus reached on the amounts (10.4.11).
Selected gemini-flash description, which is visually more accurate. Consensus reached on the amounts (9.11.0).

Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'Benington'. Amounts are clearly '8.0.1'. The dash in the shillings column indicates zero. gpt-5-mini had incorrect shillings and pence and a different name.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'Tretkewin'. Amounts are clearly '4.2.0'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '44' for pounds and transcribed a different name.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'Little Tew'. gpt-5-mini had a typo 'Little Ten'.
Consensus reached between both extractors. Visually confirmed description and amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'P. Fidge Do' and amount '12.15.6'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '13' for pounds and transcribed 'Judge'.
Selected gemini-flash description, which is visually more accurate. Consensus reached on the amounts (12.19.10).
Consensus reached between both extractors. Visually confirmed description and amounts.
Consensus reached between both extractors. Visually confirmed description and amounts. gemini-flash's note regarding the clarity of '2' in the pounds digit is a good detail.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'Busby Do' and amount '36.12.11½'. The pence is clearly '11' with a half-penny fraction. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '1' for pence.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'Lad Lane Comyns'. gpt-5-mini missed 'Comyns' from the header.

Selected gemini-flash description. Visually confirmed 'Do Wilson'. Amount is clearly '0.8.0', with a dash in the pence column indicating zero. gemini-flash incorrectly read '8' for pence; gpt-5-mini had a different name, and incorrect pounds/pence.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'Do Pickford' and amount '0.6.0'. gpt-5-mini had a different name and incorrect pounds/shillings.
Selected gemini-flash description, which is visually more accurate. Consensus reached on the amounts (1.10.0).

Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed 'Do' as a distinct entry line with amount '0.6.0'. gpt-5-mini missed this row and incorrectly associated its amount with the 'Medenham' row, misinterpreting it as 6 pounds.

Selected gpt-5-mini's interpretation that this line is a header with no amount, as visually confirmed. Corrected spelling to 'praesentis'. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned the total amount to this line.

Extracted from image. This is the actual total amount line, distinct from the 'Recepta Anni praesentis' label above it. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the amounts and row type but incorrectly used the amount as the description. gemini-flash missed this distinct row entirely by merging it with the previous descriptive line.
Consensus reached between both extractors. Visually confirmed as a header with no amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed description 'Dividend on New 1.0.' and amount '19.3.8'. gpt-5-mini had a different description and incorrectly read '9' for pounds.
Consensus reached between both extractors. Visually confirmed description and amounts.

Selected gemini-flash for empty description. Consensus reached on the amounts (38.7.4). gpt-5-mini's note on the arithmetic mismatch (9.3.8 + 19.3.8 = 28.7.4 vs. 38.7.4 written) is a valuable observation, demonstrating careful review, but the transcription must reflect the written value.
